title: phip:software
description: Schema for the phip:software attribute namespace. Covers firmware and software versions, configuration hashes, and OS identity. Applicable to object types: component, assembly, system.

firmware_date.description: Firmware build or release date (ISO 8601 date).

os.description: Operating system name and version (e.g. 'Ubuntu 24.04 LTS', 'VxWorks 7').

config_hash.description: Hash of the active configuration, for drift detection. Format: 'sha256:<hex>' or 'sha512:<hex>'.

image_hash.description: Hash of the deployed firmware or OS image.

drivers.description: Driver versions keyed by driver name or subsystem.
